commands.summary: Governance validation passes; the new parity check is silent for RepoPact's own prose work-item READMEs (gated on the checklist convention).
Full validator test suite passes, including two new parity tests (flags a contradicting checkbox, silent without checkboxes).

environment.process_note: Added validate_readme_checkbox_parity to validate_repo.py: where a work-item README uses the - [ ] **ID** checklist convention, checkboxes must match the manifest (satisfied->[x], pending->[ ]); gated on the convention so prose READMEs are unaffected. VERSION 1.5.0 -> 1.6.0. Contributed up from ForgeLink (downstream consumer).
